headline: Allegion Schedules Webcast to Announce 2026 First-Quarter Results
summary: DUBLIN, April 14, 2026--Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a leading global security products and solutions provider, will release its 2026 first-quarter financial results on Tuesday, April 28, before the market opens.
